What We Do

THREE
pillars

We operate at the intersection of cinematic storytelling, modern software engineering, and intelligent automation. Every engagement is custom-scoped, strategy-led, and built to move the needle.

01
01
VIDEO MARKETING
Premium cinematic campaigns for brands with significant ambition. Brand films, product launches, event coverage, ad creative, and multi-platform content strategies - all produced with full scripting, professional crew, and post-production finishing. We work with brands that understand video is a strategic investment, not a line item.
Brand Films Ad Creative Event Coverage Live Streaming Content Strategy
→
02
CUSTOM SOFTWARE
We design and build production-ready software - fast. Web platforms, SaaS products, internal tools, client-facing apps, and AI-powered solutions. We've built our own products (StreamLive, Adboard) using the same process we bring to client work: rapid prototyping, clean architecture, and shipping in weeks instead of quarters.
Web Platforms SaaS Products AI Solutions Rapid Build Full-Stack
→
03
AUTOMATION
We help businesses eliminate manual work and scale operations through intelligent automation. Custom workflows, AI agents, CRM integrations, and connected systems that run your business while you focus on growth. From automating lead pipelines to building internal tools that replace entire teams of manual processes.
Workflow Automation AI Agents CRM Integration API Connections Process Design
→

How We Work

THE CINEMATIC
process

From initial concept to final distribution, every project follows our proven five-phase production pipeline built for quality, speed, and platform-maximized results.

01
Discovery
STRATEGY & BRIEF
Deep brand immersion. We define your audience, goals, tone, and the story only your brand can tell.
Creative Brief
Mood Board
Platform Strategy
02
Pre-Production
PLAN & PREP
Scripting, storyboarding, location scouting, talent casting, and logistics. Every detail dialed in.
Script / Storyboard
Shot List
Call Sheet
03
Production
LIGHTS, CAMERA
Professional crew, cinema-grade cameras, lighting, and audio capture. Multi-angle, high-efficiency shooting days.
Raw Footage
BTS Content
Same-Day Clips
04
Post-Production
CRAFT & REFINE
Expert editing, cinematic color grading, sound design, motion graphics, and multi-format export cuts.
Master Edit
Platform Cuts
Thumbnail Assets
05
Distribution
LAUNCH & SCALE
Strategic publishing, caption writing, and performance reporting across every channel.
Published Assets
Analytics Report
Repurpose Plan

Powered by StreamLive

BROADCAST
EVERYWHERE
AT ONCE

StreamLive is our proprietary multi-destination live broadcasting platform. One production, deployed simultaneously to YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and any custom RTMP destination. We handle the entire technical stack so you can focus on what's happening on stage. Used for product launches, conference keynotes, brand activations, community events, and anything that deserves a live audience larger than the room.

🔀
Multi-Destination
Stream to 10+ platforms simultaneously from a single production.
🎬
Cinematic Quality
4K output with real-time color grading and branded graphics overlays.
📊
Live Analytics
Real-time viewer counts, engagement, and platform performance dashboards.
✂️
Auto-Clip & Replay
AI-assisted clipping creates on-demand social assets from your live broadcast.

How It Works

AUTOMATE
everything

We audit your operations, identify the manual bottlenecks, and build connected systems that run themselves. Here's how every automation engagement works.

01
AUDIT
We map your current workflows, tools, and pain points. Every manual task, disconnected system, and repetitive process gets documented.
→
02
DESIGN
We architect the automated system - which tools connect, where AI agents take over, and how data flows between platforms without human intervention.
→
03
BUILD
We implement the integrations, configure the AI agents, wire up the APIs, and build custom logic. Everything gets tested end-to-end before going live.
→
04
OPTIMIZE
We monitor performance, refine triggers, and expand the system over time. Automation gets smarter and handles more as your business scales.

What We Automate

📥
Lead Pipelines
Capture leads from forms, ads, and social - auto-enrich, score, route to CRM, and trigger follow-up sequences without lifting a finger.
🤖
AI Agents
Custom AI assistants that handle customer support, qualify prospects, summarize meetings, draft proposals, and process documents 24/7.
🔗
System Integrations
Connect your CRM, email, billing, project management, and internal tools so data syncs automatically across your entire stack.
📊
Reporting Dashboards
Auto-generated reports that pull from every source - sales, marketing, ops - and land in your inbox or Slack without anyone building a spreadsheet.
📧
Email & Outreach
Triggered email sequences, personalized follow-ups, and drip campaigns that fire based on behavior, not a calendar reminder.
⚙️
Internal Operations
Onboarding flows, invoice generation, task routing, approval chains, and team notifications - all the work that shouldn't require a human.

How it works
Inquiry → Discovery call → Custom proposal → Contract → We build · Simple, fast, no surprises.
WILLIAM MAURO
Marketer & Videographer

The Builder

"We build products that solve real problems, tools that make people's lives easier and businesses run better."

William Mauro is an entrepreneur, product builder, and technologist with 10+ years working at the intersection of software, brand strategy, and digital execution. His career spans early-stage startups to Fortune 500 enterprise, giving him a rare fluency in what businesses actually need to grow.

Before founding Vantage Mode, Will co-founded Shopsy, a commerce platform that enabled direct shopping from Instagram content, building partnerships with Sephora, Lululemon, and Forever 21 before acquisition. He then led North American customer success at Amplience, managing enterprise accounts including Crate & Barrel, TUMI, Tom Ford, Panasonic, and Mizuno.

Since 2019, he's channeled that mix of entrepreneurial instinct and technical fluency into building products that matter: StreamLive for live broadcasting, AdBoard for local advertising, Docket for family court documentation, and Foresight for personal finance. Each one built from scratch to solve a specific problem for a specific person. He's also deeply committed to his Princeton, NJ community, with a focus on families, sustainability, and civic engagement.

Product Builder Software & Automation Growth Marketing Video Production Startup Founder Enterprise SaaS Princeton, NJ

Got Questions

FAQ

Everything you need to know before we start working together.

Ask Us Directly →
What kind of projects do you take on?
+
We focus on three things: premium video campaigns (brand films, product launches, event coverage, ad creative), custom software builds (web platforms, SaaS products, internal tools, AI-powered apps), and business automation (workflows, AI agents, CRM integrations, connected systems). Every engagement is custom-scoped.
Do you work with clients globally?
+
Yes. We work with clients across the US and internationally. For video production, travel is built into project scopes. For software builds, location is completely irrelevant - we work remotely with teams everywhere.
How fast can you build software?
+
Most software projects ship in weeks, not months. We built StreamLive and Adboard - two full platforms - using the same rapid-build process we bring to client work. Timeline depends on scope, but we move fast without cutting corners.
What does a typical video engagement look like?
+
We start with a discovery call to understand your goals, then scope a custom proposal. Production includes full creative strategy, professional crew, cinema-grade equipment, expert editing, color grading, and multi-platform delivery. Timelines range from 1-4 weeks depending on complexity.
How does pricing work?
+
Every project is custom-priced based on scope. We don't do packages or tiers. After a discovery call, we send a detailed proposal with a fixed price, clear deliverables, and timeline. No surprises.
What are StreamLive and Adboard?
+
They're products we built ourselves. StreamLive is a multi-destination live broadcasting platform. Adboard is a local digital advertising network. They're proof of what we can build - and the same caliber of work we deliver for clients.
VIDEO CAMPAIGNS ◆ CUSTOM SOFTWARE ◆ BRAND FILMS ◆ WEB PLATFORMS ◆ PRODUCT LAUNCHES ◆ LIVE STREAMING ◆ RAPID BUILDS ◆ AUTOMATION ◆ STRATEGY ◆ VIDEO CAMPAIGNS ◆ CUSTOM SOFTWARE ◆ BRAND FILMS ◆ WEB PLATFORMS ◆ PRODUCT LAUNCHES ◆ LIVE STREAMING ◆ RAPID BUILDS ◆ AUTOMATION ◆ STRATEGY ◆
